body:
DUPLICATION FLAGS:
1. Hero.tsx (T3) has CSS-based ambient orbs BUT BackgroundAnimation.tsx (T2) also has canvas-based orbs. Two implementations of similar effect.
2. Hero.tsx uses inline button styles instead of shared Button.tsx component. Recommend Hero import Button for consistency.
3. FeatureCard.tsx uses 'glass' utility class while GlassCard.tsx exists - could wrap FeatureCard in GlassCard.
Not critical but reduces consistency.
